name: Self Learning Content Engine HWW all platforms

parameters.jsCode:
const strategy = $input.first().json;
return strategy.content_pillars.map(p => ({
  strategy_id: strategy.strategy_id,
  scheduled_date: p.date,
  day_of_week: p.day,
  pillar: p.pillar,
  topic: p.topic,
  topic_readable: p.topic_readable,
  core_message: p.core_message,
  sharp_hook: p.sharp_hook,
  tradeoff_line: p.tradeoff_line,
  video_style: p.video_style,
  priority_platforms: JSON.stringify(p.priority_platforms),
  expected_performance: p.expected_performance,
  philosophy_flag: p.philosophy_flag,
  language_seed: p.language_seed,
  status: 'scheduled',
  created_at: new Date().toISOString()
}));

parameters.content: WORKFLOW 1: CONTENT STRATEGY & PHILOSOPHY PLANNING AGENT

WORKFLOW 2: MASTER CONTENT GENERATOR (SOURCE OF TRUTH)

Key Features:

✅ Enforces pillar purity (one pillar only, except Integration)
✅ Requires clear stance, consequence, takeaway
✅ Explicit tradeoff line mandatory
✅ Pillar-specific tone enforcement (Health=evidence-based, Wealth=operator-first, Wisdom=sparse/contemplative)
✅ Language seeds for vocabulary training
✅ Identity-oriented headlines (not clickbait)
✅ Faceless video specs with B-roll keywords
✅ Automatic trigger to Workflow 3

parameters.jsCode:
const plan = $input.first().json;

const priorityPlatforms = typeof plan.priority_platforms === 'string' ? JSON.parse(plan.priority_platforms) : plan.priority_platforms;

return {
  calendar_id: plan.id,
  strategy_id: plan.strategy_id,
  scheduled_date: plan.scheduled_date,
  day_of_week: plan.day_of_week,
  pillar: plan.pillar,
  topic: plan.topic,
  topic_readable: plan.topic_readable,
  core_message: plan.core_message,
  sharp_hook: plan.sharp_hook,
  tradeoff_line: plan.tradeoff_line,
  video_style: plan.video_style,
  priority_platforms: priorityPlatforms,
  expected_performance: plan.expected_performance,
  philosophy_flag: plan.philosophy_flag,
  language_seed: plan.language_seed || ''
};

parameters.content:
WORKFLOW 3: PLATFORM ADAPTATION ENGINE (15 VARIANTS)

Key Features:

✅ 15 platform-native adaptations (no copy-pasting)
✅ Each adaptation answers "Why does this belong HERE?"
✅ Platform-specific language, pacing, CTAs
✅ Pillar prioritization logic embedded
✅ Optimal posting times assigned per platform
✅ Automatic triggers to Workflows 4-7

parameters.jsCode:
const mc = $input.first().json;
const masterContentJson = typeof mc.master_content_json === 'string' ? JSON.parse(mc.master_content_json) : mc.master_content_json;

return {
  content_id: mc.content_id,
  pillar: mc.pillar,
  scheduled_date: mc.scheduled_date,
  topic_readable: mc.topic_readable,
  headline: masterContentJson.headline,
  hook: masterContentJson.hook,
  core_script: masterContentJson.core_script,
  key_points: masterContentJson.key_points,
  explicit_tradeoff: masterContentJson.explicit_tradeoff,
  faceless_video_specs: masterContentJson.faceless_video_specs,
  cta: masterContentJson.cta,
  long_form_outline: masterContentJson.long_form_outline,
  hashtag_suggestions: masterContentJson.hashtag_suggestions,
  seo_keywords: masterContentJson.seo_keywords,
  language_seed: masterContentJson.language_seed
};

parameters.content:
WORKFLOW 4: SHORT-FORM VIDEO DISTRIBUTION

What This Does:

Webhook-triggered by Workflow 3
Processes 4 platforms: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, Snapchat Spotlight
Pulls 3 random B-roll clips from pillar-tagged video library
Generates pillar-specific AI voiceover (ElevenLabs with different voices per pillar)
Composites 9:16 vertical video using FFmpeg:

Concatenates 3 B-roll clips
Adds AI voiceover
Overlays text at specific timestamps


Uploads to each platform's API
Publishes (TikTok/Instagram require separate publish step)
Logs all 4 published videos to published_content table

Key Features:

✅ Pillar-specific voices (Health=authoritative, Wealth=confident, Wisdom=contemplative)
✅ Faceless format (stock footage + voiceover + text overlays)
✅ 9:16 vertical aspect ratio (mobile-optimized)
✅ Platform-native upload/publish flows
✅ Automatic scheduling at optimal times

nodes.name: Get B-Roll from Library (Pillar-Tagged)
nodes.notes: Pulls 3 random footage clips tagged to this pillar

nodes.name: Composite Video (FFmpeg - Faceless)
nodes.notes: Creates: B-roll (9:16) → Add voiceover → Add text overlays

nodes.name: Needs Publish Step?
nodes.notes: TikTok/Instagram require separate publish API call

parameters.content:
WORKFLOW 5: VISUAL STORY & CAROUSEL DISTRIBUTION

✅ What This Does:

Webhook-triggered by Workflow 3
Processes 3 visual platforms: Instagram Carousel, Instagram Stories, Snapchat Stories
Routes to platform-specific generation logic:

Instagram Carousel:

Generates 5-10 identity statement slides (not tips)
Pillar-specific design system (Health=blue/cyan, Wealth=black/gold, Wisdom=purple/cream)
Each slide emphasizes who you ARE, not what to DO
Uploads all slides as carousel container
Publishes to Instagram

Instagram Stories:

Generates 3-5 ephemeral frames
Includes interaction prompts (polls/questions) that reinforce pillar thinking
Examples: "Do you track your HRV?" (Health), "CAC > LTV?" (Wealth), "Death = end or transition?" (Wisdom)
24-hour lifespan

Snapchat Stories:

More raw/informal than Instagram
Intentionally less polished design
Casual language for Gen Z demographic
3-5 frames


Logs all 3 visual assets to published_content table

Key Features:

✅ Identity-focused (not tip-focused)
✅ Pillar-specific color schemes automatically applied
✅ Interaction prompts reinforce pillar thinking
✅ Snapchat intentionally more casual than Instagram
✅ Swipe-worthy carousel structure (Slide 1 = identity hook, Last slide = CTA)

nodes.name: Generate Carousel Slides (Identity-Focused)
nodes.notes: Creates 5-10 identity statement slides with pillar-specific design

nodes.name: Generate IG Story Frames (Interaction-Focused)
nodes.notes: Creates 3-5 frames with polls/questions that reinforce pillar thinking

nodes.name: Generate Snapchat Story (Raw/Informal)
nodes.notes: More casual/authentic than Instagram Stories

parameters.content:
WORKFLOW 6: TEXT PLATFORM DISTRIBUTION

What This Does:

Webhook-triggered by Workflow 3
Processes 4 text platforms: Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit
Routes to platform-specific validation and posting logic:

Twitter/X:

Validates Wealth posts reference execution OR consequence
Validates Wisdom posts ask a real question (cannot preach)
Posts first tweet, then builds thread as replies if needed
Each tweet must work standalone

LinkedIn:

Same validation rules as Twitter (Wealth = execution/consequence, Wisdom = real question)
Professional long-form format (1200-1800 chars)
First line optimized as hook (visible before "see more")
Posts using LinkedIn UGC Posts API

Facebook:

Conversational, personal tone (300-500 words)
Story-like format
No special validation (more relaxed)

Reddit:

STRICT VALIDATION:

Must be value-first (title/body includes "here's what", "I learned", "breakdown", "analysis", "data shows", "tested")
No promotional language ("check out", "link in bio", "follow me", "subscribe", "buy")
Expectation-managed (humble, not authoritative)


Posts to first suggested subreddit
Pure value, zero self-promotion


Logs all 4 text posts to published_content table

Key Features:

✅ No recycled phrasing between platforms (enforced by Workflow 3 AI)
✅ Wealth posts MUST reference execution or consequence
✅ Wisdom posts MUST ask real questions (cannot preach)
✅ Reddit is value-first with strict anti-promotion validation
✅ Platform-native APIs (Twitter v2, LinkedIn UGC, Facebook Graph, Reddit OAuth)

nodes.name: Validate & Format Twitter/X
nodes.notes: Enforces: Wealth = execution/consequence, Wisdom = real question

nodes.name: Validate & Format LinkedIn
nodes.notes: Enforces same rules as Twitter

nodes.name: Validate & Format Reddit (Value-First)
nodes.notes: Enforces: Value-first, no promotion, expectation-managed

parameters.content:
WORKFLOW 7: LONG-FORM CONTENT DISTRIBUTION

What This Does:

Webhook-triggered by Workflow 3
Processes 4 long-form platforms: YouTube Long, Blog (WordPress), Newsletter, Pinterest
Routes to platform-specific generation and publishing:

YouTube Long-Form:

Validates depth (minimum 5 sections in script outline)
Validates product seeds (must mention "operating system", "personal OS", "AI assistant", "philosophy", "system that runs")
Outputs script outline with timestamps
Note: Video production is MANUAL (requires HeyGen AI avatar or manual recording)
Logs as "manual_production_required"

Blog (WordPress):

Validates depth (minimum 4 H2 sections)
Builds full HTML article from outline
Automatically embeds product seed in conclusion:

"This is why we're building HealthWealthWisdom.ai - a Personal Operating System that runs your day like a philosophy-driven machine. Health as foundation, Wealth as leverage, Wisdom as compass. Systems over willpower."


Publishes to WordPress via REST API
SEO-optimized (title, meta description, slug)

Email Newsletter:

Builds HTML email with pillar-specific styling
Embeds product seed in styled callout box:

"Why this matters: This is the kind of clarity a Personal Operating System gives you. Not tips. Not motivation. Systems that run your life like philosophy-driven infrastructure."


Fetches active subscribers from database
Sends to all subscribers via Gmail API (batch)
Includes PS line for personal touch

Pinterest:

Generates vertical pin (1000×1500) with text overlay
Links to published blog post (traffic driver)
SEO-rich description (100-500 chars with keywords)
Posts to Pinterest board via API v5


Logs all 4 long-form assets to published_content table

Key Features:

✅ Long-form is earned (depth validation enforced)
✅ Product seeds explicitly planted (Personal OS AI, philosophy-driven products)
✅ Not chasing volume (minimum depth thresholds)
✅ Blog → Pinterest cross-platform traffic loop
✅ Newsletter reaches engaged audience with identity-building messaging

nodes.name: Validate YouTube Long-Form (Depth Required)
nodes.notes: Ensures depth + product seeds (Personal OS AI)

nodes.name: YouTube: Manual Production Note
nodes.notes: Long-form video not automated (requires HeyGen AI avatar or manual)

nodes.name: Build Blog Article (Product Seeds Embedded)
nodes.notes: Builds full HTML, plants Personal OS AI seeds in conclusion

parameters.jsCode:
const newsletterData = $input.first().json.adaptation_data; const pillar = $input.first().json.pillar; // Build HTML email with product seeds const emailHTML = `

${newsletterData.body.replace(/\n/g, '

')}

Why this matters: This is the kind of clarity a Personal Operating System gives you. Not tips. Not motivation. Systems that run your life like philosophy-driven infrastructure. Health + Wealth + Wisdom as one coherent machine.

P.S. ${newsletterData.ps_line}

HealthWealthWisdom.ai • Building the Personal OS for high-performers

`; return { platform: 'newsletter', pillar: pillar, subject_line: newsletterData.subject_line, preview_text: newsletterData.preview_text, email_html: emailHTML, posting_time: newsletterData.posting_time, adaptation_id: $input.first().json.adaptation_id, content_id: $input.first().json.content_id };

nodes.name: Build Newsletter Email (Product Seeds)
nodes.notes: Embeds Personal OS AI seed in styled callout box

parameters.name: raw

parameters.content:
WORKFLOW 8: PERFORMANCE ANALYTICS & LEARNING ENGINE
What This Does:
Two-phase intelligence system:

Daily (11:00 PM EST): Sync metrics from all 15 platforms
Weekly (Sunday 11:30 PM EST): Generate intelligence report → Feed back to Workflow 1


Phase 1: Daily Metrics Sync (11 PM)
1. Fetch Last 24h Published Content
Queries published_content table for all posts from last 24 hours
2. Group by Platform
Organizes posts into 15 platform buckets for batch API calls
3. Platform-Specific Metrics Collection:
TikTok Analytics:

Views, likes, comments, shares
Identity signals: Saves (not exposed via API, estimated), repeat viewers

Instagram Analytics:

Impressions, reach, engagement
Identity signals: Saves, profile visits (follower conversion proxy)

YouTube Analytics:

Views, likes, comments, shares
Identity signals: subscribersGained, averageViewDuration (repeat viewers)

Twitter/X Analytics:

Impressions, likes, replies, retweets
Identity signals: Bookmarks (not exposed), retweets as endorsement

LinkedIn Analytics:

Impressions, likes, comments, shares
Identity signals: Comments (professional engagement), follower growth

(Similar for Facebook, Reddit, Snapchat, Pinterest, Blog, Newsletter)
4. Calculate Identity-Weighted Engagement Scores
Weighting Formula:
javascriptidentityScore = (
  (saves × 5) +           // Save = strong intent
  (comments × 3) +        // Comment = engagement depth
  (new_followers × 10) +  // Follow = identity alignment
  (shares × 2) +          // Share = endorsement
  (likes × 1)             // Like = weak signal
)

engagementScore = Math.min(100, Math.round(identityScore / 10))
Engagement rate: (identityScore / views) × 100
5. Save to Database
All metrics saved to content_performance table with:

Platform-specific raw metrics
Identity-weighted scores
JSON object of identity signals


Phase 2: Weekly Intelligence Report (Sunday 11:30 PM)
1. Fetch 7-Day Performance Data
Queries last 7 days from content_performance joined with:

content_calendar (pillar, topic, philosophy_flag)
master_content (language_seed)

2. Aggregate by Pillar
Per Pillar Analysis:

Average engagement score
Identity signal average (saves + followers)
Best platforms (ranked by identity conversion rate, not engagement)
Top topics (ranked by identity score)
Philosophy flag performance (reinforce vs. challenge vs. redefine)

Pattern Detection:

Strongest pillar: Highest identity signals average
Weakest pillar: Lowest identity signals average
Generic drift detection: High engagement but low identity signals (<30% ratio) = generic content

3. GPT-4o Intelligence Generation
AI analyzes and generates:
3 Tactical Adjustments:
json{
  "pillar": "Health",
  "adjustment": "Double down on nervous_system topic on TikTok (5x identity signals vs. generic sleep content)",
  "reason": "nervous_system posts drove 3x more saves and 2x follower conversion than metabolic_health"
}
2 Experiments:
json{
  "pillar": "Wealth",
  "hypothesis": "'Challenge' philosophy flag drives more shares on LinkedIn than 'reinforce'",
  "test_design": "Run 3 Wealth posts with 'challenge' flag, 3 with 'reinforce', measure share rate",
  "success_metric": "Challenge posts get >2x shares with maintained follower conversion"
}
1 Philosophy Refinement:
json{
  "pillar": "Wisdom",
  "current_problem": "Drifting into quote-like content (high likes, low comments)",
  "refinement": "Every Wisdom post must ask a question with no clean answer. No preaching.",
  "test": "Does this increase comment depth (measured by avg words per comment)?"
}
4. Save Intelligence Report
Saved to weekly_performance_analysis table
5. Automatic Feedback Loop
Triggers webhook to Workflow 1 with intelligence report
Workflow 1's next strategy generation (Sunday 6 PM) will incorporate:

Tactical adjustments (platform/topic shifts)
Experiments (new angles to test)
Philosophy refinement (sharper pillar boundaries)


Key Features:
✅ Identity signals prioritized (saves, followers, comments) over vanity (views, likes)
✅ Generic drift detection (high engagement + low identity = becoming generic)
✅ Platform performance by pillar (Health best on TikTok, Wealth on LinkedIn, etc.)
✅ Philosophy flag tracking (which flags drive identity behaviors)
✅ Self-improving feedback loop (Week N insights → Week N+1 strategy automatically)
✅ Data-driven experiments (testable hypotheses with clear success metrics)
✅ Pillar sharpening (prevents philosophical saturation through refinements)

nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 11pm EST
nodes.notes: Daily analytics sync from all 15 platforms

nodes.name: Schedule: Sunday 11:30pm EST
nodes.notes: Weekly intelligence report + feedback to Workflow 1

nodes.name: Fetch TikTok Analytics
nodes.notes: Identity signals: saves (not exposed), comments, shares, repeat viewers

nodes.name: Fetch Instagram Analytics
nodes.notes: Identity signals: saves, profile visits, follower conversion

nodes.name: Fetch YouTube Analytics
nodes.notes: Identity signals: subscribersGained, averageViewDuration (repeat viewers)

nodes.name: Fetch Twitter/X Analytics
nodes.notes: Identity signals: retweets, replies, bookmarks (not exposed via API)

nodes.name: Fetch LinkedIn Analytics
nodes.notes: Identity signals: comments, shares, follower growth

nodes.name: Calculate Identity-Weighted Scores
nodes.notes: Saves=5x, Comments=3x, Followers=10x, Shares=2x, Likes=1x

nodes.name: Aggregate by Pillar (Detect Drift)
nodes.notes: Identifies strongest pillar + generic drift (low identity signals)

nodes.name: Trigger Feedback to Workflow 1
nodes.notes: Automatically feeds insights back into next week's strategy

parameters.content:
🎯 WHAT YOU NOW HAVE:
A self-improving, philosophy-driven content engine that:

Plans (Workflow 1) → Pillar-pure strategy with identity focus
Creates (Workflow 2) → Master content with explicit tradeoffs + stances
Adapts (Workflow 3) → 15 platform-native versions (no copy-paste)
Distributes (Workflows 4-7) → Automated publishing across all channels
Learns (Workflow 8) → Identity-focused analytics that feed back into strategy

How the Feedback Loop Works:
Sunday 11:30 PM: Workflow 8 generates intelligence report
↓
Sunday 11:30 PM: Webhook triggers Workflow 1 with insights
↓
Next Sunday 6:00 PM: Workflow 1 incorporates intelligence into new strategy
↓
Monday-Sunday: Content executes based on improved strategy
↓
Next Sunday 11:30 PM: Performance measured, new insights generated
↓
LOOP REPEATS ♻️
Result: System gets smarter every week. Identity signals improve. Generic drift eliminated. Pillar thinking sharpens.
